channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Death toll jumps to 90 in China coal mine blast
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Coal mine gas explosion in China kills 90; more than 200 rescued
- At Least 90 People Killed in Coal Mine Blast in China, State Media Reports
- At Least 90 People Killed After Coal Mine Blast in China, State Media Reports
- Coal mine explosion in China kills 90 people, state media say
- Death toll in coal mine explosion in China’s Shanxi Province rises to 90
- Coal mine gas explosion in China kills more than 80 after dozens earlier reported trapped underground, state media says
- Coal mine gas explosion in China kills 90, state media say
- China: Dozens dead in coal mine blast — state media
- Gas explosion at Chinese coal mine kills at least 90
- At least 90 dead in Chinese coal mine explosion, state media reports
- Eight people killed, dozens more trapped in China coal mine explosion
- Xi Jinping urges 'all-out rescue' after coal mine explosion kills at least 90 in China
- Over 80 killed in gas explosion at coal mine in China’s Shanxi province
- Dozens dead in Chinese coal mine explosion – media (VIDEO)
- Coal mine gas explosion in China kills at least 82 people: State media
- Death toll rises to 90 in China coal mine explosion
- Eight dead, 38 trapped in China coal mine accident, Xinhua reports
- China: At least 8 dead, dozens trapped in coal mine blast
- 8 killed, dozens trapped after coal mine blast in China
- Chinese President ​Xi Jinping orders rescue efforts after Shanxi coal mine blast kills 8, traps 38
- China's Xi orders rescue efforts after Shanxi coal mine blast kills 8, traps 38
- ‘Over 50’ killed in China coal mine blast: State media]]>
